title: filago gallica var. tenuifolia
intro: Filago gallica var. tenuifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved fleabane, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its small yellow or pink flowers and narrow leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Filago gallica var. tenuifolia include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote wound healing and skin health.
